events.name: breakthrough
events.description: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.

events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Fen Marsh notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Rust Vega wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Slate Gorge whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Echo Vale notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
